LLVM API Documentation

Here is a list of all enum values with links to the classes they belong to:

- w -

  • Warning : llvm::Module
  • Weak : llvm::GenericSchedulerBase, llvm::SDep, llvm::ValueHandleBase
  • WeakAnyLinkage : llvm::GlobalValue
  • WeakODRLinkage : llvm::GlobalValue
  • WHITE : llvm::raw_ostream
